description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a boxy, geometric design, upholstered in a smooth, matte brown fabric. The seat and backrest are thickly padded, providing comfort and support, while the armrests are integrated into the main frame, forming a continuous, angular silhouette. The chair sits atop a sturdy black metal base with five spokes, each ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The central support column is cylindrical and made of metal, connecting the seat to the wheeled base. The backrest is straight and extends to the same height as the armrests, giving the chair a cohesive, monolithic appearance. There are no visible adjustment levers or mechanisms on the exterior.
description: A boxy, brown upholstered swivel chair with integrated armrests and a black five-spoke wheeled base. The chair features a padded seat and backrest for comfort and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat, straight backrest, and integrated armrests, with the black wheeled base visible below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, continuous armrest and the angular profile of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, rectangular backrest and the symmetrical alignment of the armrests and base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the chair's solid, boxy construction and the five-spoke base.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical black metal column, likely steel, connecting the seat to the five-spoke wheeled base; appears fixed and robust.
attribute_seat_back_design: Rectangular, straight backrest at the same height as the armrests, thickly padded, upholstered in brown fabric, with no visible patterns or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, boxy armrests that are part of the main frame, padded and upholstered in the same brown fabric, with straight lines and no separate attachment.
